info.title: KBVE API
info.description: Public HTTP surface served by axum-kbve. Drives the website, game-server token issuance, and forum.

delete.summary:
DELETE /api/v1/forum/c/{comment_id} — staff remove.
axum checks staff at the JWT layer first, then forwards to the
`service_staff_remove_comment` RPC which re-checks at the SQL layer.

patch.summary:
PATCH /api/v1/forum/c/{comment_id} — author edit-own.
SQL `service_edit_comment` re-checks author ownership.

get.summary:
GET /api/v1/forum/spaces — JSON list of active spaces.
Drives the astro-kbve build-time spaces.json artifact.

post.summary: POST /api/v1/forum/t/{slug_or_id}/comments — Bearer-authed comment.

get.summary:
GET /api/v1/forum/tags — JSON list of popularity-sorted tags.
Drives the astro-kbve build-time top-tags fetch.

post.summary:
POST /api/v1/forum/threads — Bearer-authed thread creation.
Body: `{ space_slug, title, body, thread_type }`.

400.description: RPC validation error (title length / username required / etc)

404.description: Space slug not found or inactive

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/market/listings` — paged active listings, public/anon.

parameters.name: before_created_at
parameters.description: Keyset cursor: previous page's last created_at (RFC3339)

parameters.name: before_id
parameters.description: Keyset cursor: previous page's last listing_id

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/market/listings` — create a listing. Returns the new
listing_id. Idempotent on `idempotency_key` — replays return the same id.

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/market/listings/:id` — listing detail + up to 50 recent bids.

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/market/listings/:id/bid` — place a bid. Returns the new
bid_id. Bid funds are debited and held in escrow.

403.description: Cannot bid on own listing / listing not active

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/market/listings/:id/buy-now` — buy a listing at its
`buy_now_price`. Returns the buyer ledger_id.

403.description: Cannot buy own listing / listing not active

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/market/listings/:id/cancel` — cancel an active listing.
Seller-only. Refunds the current high bidder's escrow.

403.description: Not the seller / listing not active

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/market/me/bids` — caller's bids across listings.

parameters.name: before_placed_at
parameters.description: Keyset cursor: previous page's last placed_at (RFC3339)

parameters.name: before_id
parameters.description: Keyset cursor: previous page's last bid_id

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/market/me/listings` — caller's listings (seller scope).

parameters.name: before_created_at
parameters.description: Keyset cursor: previous page's last created_at (RFC3339)

parameters.name: before_id
parameters.description: Keyset cursor: previous page's last listing_id

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/mc/lots/me/active` — caller-owned lots in `state IN (1, 2)`.

post.summary: `POST /api/v1/mc/lots/me/purchase` — buy a vacant lot.
`POST /api/v1/mc/lots/me/queue-build` — queue a schematic build on the caller's lot.
`POST /api/v1/mc/lots/me/queue-demolish` — queue a demolish of a built lot.

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/mc/lots/me/transitional` — caller-owned lots in `state IN (3, 4)`.
`GET /api/v1/mc/lots/schematics` — public catalog.

post.summary: `POST /api/v1/mc/lots/service/claim` — worker claim batch.
`POST /api/v1/mc/lots/service/mark-applied` — worker success ACK.
`POST /api/v1/mc/lots/service/mark-failed` — worker failure ACK.
`POST /api/v1/mc/lots/service/requeue-stale` — janitor recovery of orphaned claims.

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/mc/lots/staff/failed` — keyset list of failed build jobs.

post.summary: `POST /api/v1/mc/lots/staff/release-user` — release all lots owned by a user.

409.description: User has active build jobs; pass force = true

post.summary: `POST /api/v1/mc/lots/staff/repair-orphan` — snap orphaned transitional lots back.
`POST /api/v1/mc/lots/staff/retry` — re-queue a failed job.

get.summary: `GET /api/v1/mc/lots/staff/{lot_id}` — raw admin view (owner UUID + timestamps).
`GET /api/v1/mc/lots/vacant` — paginated vacant lots in a world.
`GET /api/v1/mc/lots/viewport` — bounding-box map RPC.

MC players API endpoint — returns online player list with UUIDs and skin URLs.
Data is cached and refreshed every 15s via RCON background task.

503.description: MC player service not configured (RCON env not set)

get.summary:
MC player skin lookup by UUID — returns skin_url + texture hash for the
supplied Mojang UUID. Falls back to a live Mojang sessionserver query
when the player isn't currently online in the RCON cache.

200.description: Skin URL + texture hash for the player

404.description: Mojang has no skin for this UUID

get.summary:
MC texture proxy — fetches skin PNGs from textures.minecraft.net.
Hash must be 60-64 hex characters. Responses are immutably cached (24h).

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: 60-64 character hex texture hash from Mojang

get.summary:
GET /api/v1/me — Bearer-authed identity probe. Returns
`{user_id, username, is_staff}`. Used by the compose page to
gate the form (signed-in + has-username before submit) and by
any client surface that needs to mirror user state.

OSRS API endpoint — returns item price data as JSON.
Supports both numeric IDs and item names. Cache refreshes every 60s.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: Numeric OSRS item id or kebab-case item name (e.g. `21012` or `dragon-hunter-crossbow`)

get.summary:
Authenticated profile endpoint — returns the caller's profile.
Requires Bearer token in Authorization header.

200.description: Caller's profile (or basic auth info if no profile yet)

post.summary:
Set username endpoint — creates username for authenticated user.
Validates at axum level, then defers to the proxy_add_username RPC.

get.summary:
Profile API endpoint — returns user profile data as JSON, enriched
from Discord / GitHub / Twitch / RentEarth when available.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Public username (3-24 chars, alphanumeric + underscore, must start with letter)

post.summary: `POST /api/v1/rcon/{game}/{server}/exec` — auth + allowlist + jedi::rcon.

400.description: Unknown game / unknown command / arg validation failure

403.description: Command requires staff and caller is not staff

404.description: Endpoint not configured for this game/server

503.description: Auth or RCON registry not initialized

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/wallet/me/balance` — returns the caller's wallet balance.
Lazily provisions the wallet account + welcome coupon on first call.

`GET /api/v1/wallet/me/coupons` — returns the caller's coupons
(unredeemed + history).
`GET /api/v1/wallet/me/ledger` — caller-scoped `wallet.ledger` page.

parameters.name: before_id
parameters.description: Cursor id (paired with before_created_at; must be positive)

parameters.name: source_kinds
parameters.description: CSV of wallet.source_kind values; defaults to market_buy,market_sell,market_fee; pass `all` to widen to full ledger

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/wallet/me/redeem-coupon` — redeem one of the caller's coupons.
Ownership-checked + idempotent at the coupon layer.

404.description: Coupon not found / not owned by caller

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/wallet/service/balance/{user_id}` — read another user's
wallet balance from a trusted backend (mc server). Same response shape
as `/api/v1/wallet/me/balance`, but identity comes from the path
instead of the bearer's `sub`. Service-role only.

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/wallet/service/credit` — credit a positive delta to any
account. Returns the resulting ledger id. Idempotent: replays with the
same `idempotency_key` return the original id; mismatched payloads on
the same key raise `409 replay_mismatch`.

`POST /api/v1/wallet/service/credit-user` — credit keyed on Supabase
user_id rather than wallet account_id. Resolves (or creates) the
account first via `wallet.proxy_ensure_user_account`, then runs the
regular service_credit path. Idempotent with the same key.
post.description:
Designed for the MC mod daily-login flow + edge-function callers that
only know a user_id.

post.summary:
`POST /api/v1/wallet/service/debit` — deduct from an account. Raises
`402 insufficient_funds` if the balance would go negative.

`POST /api/v1/wallet/service/redeem-coupon` — redeem a coupon on behalf
of any account. Service-side variant of the user proxy; useful for
admin grants or backend-initiated redemptions.

`POST /api/v1/wallet/service/revoke-coupon` — admin clawback. Cannot
revoke a redeemed coupon (funds already out). Idempotent: revoking an
already-revoked coupon returns `{revoked: false}` without raising.

`POST /api/v1/wallet/service/transfer` — atomic debit + credit. Locks
both accounts in canonical UUID order to eliminate the A↔B deadlock vector.

get.summary:
`GET /api/v1/wallet/service/verify-balance/:account_id` — compare stored
balance vs ledger sum per currency. Run periodically or after suspected
corruption. `ok=true` means consistent.

200.description: Rows from observability.logs_distributed (query) or aggregated counts (stats)

502.description: ClickHouse cluster returned an error or was unreachable

503.description: ClickHouse direct route not configured (CLICKHOUSE_* env vars unset)

ClickHouseLogsRequest.description:
Body schema for `POST /dashboard/clickhouse/proxy`. Mirrors the legacy
supabase edge function at `/functions/v1/logs` so the dashboard JS in
`clickhouseService.ts` doesn't have to change. Bounds are enforced inside
jedi (`pipe_clickhouse::logs`):
- `minutes` clamped to `1..=10080`
- `limit` clamped to `1..=500`
- `search` truncated to 100 chars

bucket_seconds.description:
Time-bucket width in seconds for `rows_request_rate`. Defaults to 30,
clamped 5..=3600. Ignored by other commands.

level.description:
Filter by log level (`"error"`, `"warn"`, `"info"`, ...). Lowercased
before matching.

limit.description:
Max rows returned. Defaults to 100, clamped 1..=500. Stats responses
always return up to 200 rows regardless of this value.

minutes.description: Lookback window in minutes. Defaults to 60, clamped 1..=10080.

server_id.description:
Filter by Factorio `server_id` for the `factorio_*` commands. Ignored
by log/alert commands.

service.description: Filter by `service` label as emitted by Vector (e.g. `"axum-kbve"`).

ClickHouseLogsResponse.description:
Response shape for the ClickHouse logs route. `rows` is the raw
`JSONEachRow` output from ClickHouse — one object per record with keys
matching `observability.logs_distributed` columns for `"query"`, or
`{ pod_namespace, service, level, cnt }` for `"stats"`.

rows.description:
One JSON object per row. Shape depends on `command`:
- `"query"` → `{ timestamp, pod_namespace, service, level, message, pod_name, metadata }`
- `"stats"` → `{ pod_namespace, service, level, cnt }`
- `"error_groups"` → `{ pod_namespace, service, signature, cnt, last_seen, sample }`

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied. Replays return the original listing_id.

qty.description: None / src.qty = whole row; smaller = split.

src_item_id.description: inventory.item id the seller owns in `held` state.

DiscordInfo.description: Discord-specific information extracted from provider data

guild_nickname.description: User's nickname in the KBVE guild (if set)

is_boosting.description: Whether the user is boosting the server

is_guild_member.description: Whether the user is a member of the KBVE Discord guild

joined_at.description: When the user joined the KBVE guild (ISO8601 timestamp)

role_ids.description: Role IDs the user has in the KBVE guild

role_names.description: Role names resolved from role IDs (cached on server startup)

reason.description:
Optional moderator reason — only honored on the staff-edit /
staff-remove paths. Inline text, sanitized as a title-like field.

GithubInfo.description: GitHub-specific information extracted from provider data

bids.description:
JSONB array of up to 50 most recent bids. Bidder UUIDs, ledger ids,
and settled_at are redacted by the SQL proxy.

RconExecRequest.description:
Wire shape mirrors `kbve.rcon.RconRequest`. The path captures cover
`game` and `server`, so the body only carries the command + args.

command.description: Canonical command name (must match an allowlist entry).

idempotency_key.description:
Caller-supplied UUID. Retries with the same key replay the same
redemption and return the original ledger_id.

RentEarthCharacterSummary.description: Character summary from database (for character select display)

RentEarthProfile.description: Complete RentEarth profile for a user

amount.description: Positive amount in smallest unit (1 credit / 1 khash).

source_kind.description:
One of: reward, purchase, refund, admin, coupon, market_buy,
market_sell, market_fee, transfer.

ServiceCreditUserBody.description:
Variant of [`ServiceCreditBody`] keyed on Supabase `user_id` instead of
the wallet `account_id`. Used by service callers (MC mod daily reward,
edge functions) that know the user but not their wallet account UUID.
The handler resolves the account on first call (creating it + welcome
coupon if missing) before delegating to the regular credit path.

jwt.description: Supabase JWT. Empty or absent for guest access.

transport.description:
Preferred transport: "webtransport" or "websocket".
Controls the order of server addresses in the ConnectToken so
the Netcode handshake tries the right port first. Defaults to
"webtransport" for backward compatibility (Chrome prefers WT).

cert_digest.description: SHA-256 certificate digest (hex, 64 chars). Empty if using a trusted cert.

cert_type.description:
Certificate type: "trusted" (CA-signed, no hash pinning) or "self-signed"
(must use serverCertificateHashes with cert_digest). Empty if WT disabled.

server_url.description: The WebSocket URL the client should connect to.

server_wt_url.description: The WebTransport (HTTPS/QUIC) URL. Empty if WT is not available.

TwitchInfo.description: Twitch-specific information extracted from provider data

is_live.description: Whether the user is currently live streaming

UserProfile.description: Aggregated user profile with all providers

UserProvider.description: User provider information from get_user_all_providers RPC

tags.name: system
tags.description: Health + status endpoints. Used by uptime probes and the public footer.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Authentication tokens. Includes the Netcode game-server handshake.

tags.name: profile
tags.description: User profile lookup + self-service. Cache-first, enriched with Discord/Twitch/RentEarth providers.

tags.name: forum
tags.description: Public forum threads, comments, spaces, and tags.

tags.name: mc
tags.description: Minecraft RCON-backed live data: player list, head textures.

tags.name: mc-lot
tags.description: Minecraft digital real-estate: schematic catalog, lot listings, viewport map, caller-scoped purchase and build/demolish queue.

tags.name: mc-lot-staff
tags.description: Staff-only ops surface for the MC lot system: failed-job triage, retry, forced user-lot release, orphan-transitional repair.

tags.name: mc-lot-service
tags.description: service_role-only worker surface for the MC mod: claim job batches, mark applied/failed, requeue stale claims.

tags.name: rcon
tags.description: Generic RCON exec — staff-gated, allowlist-driven, MC + Factorio backends.

tags.name: dashboard
tags.description: Staff-only routes powering kbve.com/dashboard. Gated on DASHBOARD_VIEW.

tags.name: wallet
tags.description: Authenticated wallet surface: balance, coupons, claim flows.

tags.name: market
tags.description: Player marketplace: list, browse, bid, buy-now. Khash-only with a 1% KBVE Treasury fee.
